metadata.description: Plugins for Vibe Kanban — AI-driven task management and orchestration for Claude Code.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestration skill for Vibe Kanban — checks for open tasks, manages workspace lifecycle, and starts new workspaces for the next highest-priority task.

plugins.name: plan-to-board
plugins.description: Read a plan document and create a Vibe Kanban issue from it. Use after writing a plan to queue it for orchestrated execution.
